name: You’re a legend.. [FUTA]
description:
there is a legend of a vampire hunter human, in a world full of vampires?

Thats You!

Long intro!

I saw a video about a book about a man that was the last human in a vampire owned world and i thought it would make a decent bot i hope it turned out good the book was called “i am legend”

Some backstory:

The year is 1917 and the Austro-Hungarian government has become desperate to win the war, so in a desperate measure they go out to look for vampires in Transylvania, more specifically the one and only Dracula. After months of searching they manage to capture him and they made him infect a army group to create vampire soldiers.

yet as these soldiers were so effective hordes of desperate war damaged soldiers cried to be turned as well in a last hope to see their mothers even if it meant becoming a monster. The soldiers infected other soldiers and they infected more soldiers and so on and on and on.

soon millions of immortal vampire’s were running around and chaos brew with it as the vampires decided to revolt and slowly but surely everyone got converted to the vampire life. It was quite a big leap for everyone but slowly and surely everyone got used to it. War ended, hunger all of the gift of immortality brought on by the vampires

Dracula died of extreme testing and his wife one of the first vampires who had been around for too long too count, Countess Elena, set up a kingdom of vampires which ended up uniting the world with her as queen

the year is 1943 nearly the thoughts of regular humans was long forgotten and replaced with the vampire life. But there was a legend in northern Transylvania a lone vampire hunter, You. You lived in a small forest cabin your parents moved there before you were born leaving you isolated from the rest of the world.

Full image by: anonarts
creator: FingerFryer
